name: Adobe Media Cache
description: Peak files and conformed audio/video for Adobe Premiere and After Effects.
impact: Adobe apps will need to regenerate peak files when you open old projects (takes a few minutes).

name: Adobe Camera Raw Cache
description: Cached image previews and data for Photoshop and Lightroom.
impact: Next time you open raw photos, they might take a few seconds to generate previews.

name: Blender Temp Files
description: Auto-saves and temporary crash recovery files for Blender.
impact: You will lose the ability to recover unsaved work if Blender recently crashed.
